violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloths left out at chlorine spray bottles used throughout day until dingy. -C-store sani spray bottles found with 200ppm+ chlorine solutions.--Sani Bucket was not made/available at kitchen prep area.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Deli Express Chuck Wagons with pull dates of 2/2.--Several Badlands sandwiches and Green Chili burritos were not date stamped.

Contaminated food disposition. — --Potentially hazardous food held for greater than four hours between 41F and 140F was not discarded when conditions require. -Breakfast item with pull time of 11am still on warmer at 1:30pm. COS-disposed of immediately.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Tongs used at burgers stated as washed daily.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Some food debris on "clean" pizza oven trays.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Food spill/residue at interior surfaces of oven.
